use criterion::{criterion_group, criterion_main, Criterion, measurement::WallTime};
use allocator_api2::alloc::Global;

fn bench_string_concat(c: &mut Criterion) {
    let items: Vec<String> = (0..1000).map(|i| format!("item_{}", i)).collect();
    // GOOD: track allocation counts in allocation-sensitive benchmark
    c.bench_function("string_concat", |b| {
        b.iter_custom(|iters| {
            let mut total_duration = std::time::Duration::ZERO;
            for _ in 0..iters {
                let start = std::time::Instant::now();
                let mut result = String::new();
                for item in &items {
                    result.push_str(item);
                    result.push(',');
                }
                total_duration += start.elapsed();
                std::hint::black_box(&result);
            }
            total_duration
        })
    });
}

criterion_group!(benches, bench_string_concat);
criterion_main!(benches);
